data.text: THICK-AT PLANET. RATHER GRAYSCALE APPEARANCE. NOT RECOMMENDED
AS A VACATION SPOT. 18 ATM PRESSURE, RELATIVELY HOT TEMPERATURES
. SOLE LANDING AT 291,61 REVEALED GRAYISH ROLLING TERRAIN AND
WHAT SEEMED TO BE SOME SORT OF A WALL JUST BEYOND THE LEASH
LIMIT AT THE NORTHWEST.RYAN GJK E6011.822.596
